sentences.target: 私は明日の授業に出席します。
sentences.reading: わたくしはあすのじゅぎょうにしゅっせきします。

translations.es: Asistiré a la clase de mañana.
translations.fr: Je vais assister au cours de demain.
translations.de: Ich werde morgen zum Unterricht gehen.
translations.pt: Vou participar da aula de amanhã.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ tham dự lớp học ngày mai.
translations.nl: Ik ga morgen naar de les.
translations.hi: मैं कल की कक्षा में भाग लूंगा।
translations.nb: Jeg skal delta på morgendagens time.
translations.sv: Jag ska gå på morgondagens lektion.
translations.ro: Voi merge la cursul de mâine.

tokens.explanation: Refers to the speaker, indicating the first-person subject.
Marks '私' as the topic of the sentence.
Indicates the time (tomorrow) when the action will take place.
Links '明日' and '授業' to indicate 'tomorrow's class'.
Refers to the lecture or class being attended.
Marks '授業' as the target location or event for attendance.
Noun that combines with 'する' to mean 'to attend'.
Polite present form of 'する', here making '出席' into 'attend'.

sentences.target: すみません、来週のセミナーに出席できません。
sentences.reading: すみません、らいしゅうのせみなーにしゅっせきできません。

translations.en: I'm sorry, I can't attend next week's seminar.
translations.es: Lo siento, no puedo asistir al seminario de la semana que viene.
translations.fr: Je suis désolé, je ne peux pas assister au séminaire de la semaine prochaine.
translations.de: Es tut mir leid, ich kann nächste Woche nicht am Seminar teilnehmen.
translations.it: Mi dispiace, non posso partecipare al seminario della prossima settimana.
translations.ko: 죄송하지만, 다음 주 세미나에 참석할 수 없어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 抱歉，我不能参加下周的研讨会。
translations.yue: 对唔住，下个礼拜嘅研讨会我唔可以出席。
translations.ru: Извините, я не смогу пойти на семинар на следующей неделе.
translations.pt: Desculpe, não posso ir ao seminário da próxima semana.
translations.he: אני מצטער, אני לא יכול להשתתף בסמינר של השבוע הבא.
translations.vi: Tôi xin lỗi, tôi không thể tham dự hội thảo tuần tới.
translations.ar: آسف، لا أستطيع حضور ندوة الأسبوع القادم.
translations.nl: Sorry, ik kan volgende week niet naar het seminar gaan.
translations.uk: Вибачте, я не можу прийти на семінар наступного тижня.
translations.hu: Sajnálom, nem tudok részt venni a jövő heti szemináriumon.
translations.hi: मैं माफी चाहता हूँ, मैं अगले सप्ताह के सेमिनार में भाग नहीं ले सकता।
translations.pl: Przepraszam, nie mogę uczestniczyć w przyszłotygodniowym seminarium.
translations.el: Λυπάμαι, δεν μπορώ να παρακολουθήσω το σεμινάριο της επόμενης εβδομάδας.
translations.nb: Beklager, jeg kan ikke delta på neste ukes seminar.
translations.id: Maaf, saya tidak bisa menghadiri seminar minggu depan.
translations.sv: Jag är ledsen, jag kan inte delta i nästa veckas seminarium.
translations.ro: Îmi pare rău, nu pot participa la seminarul de săptămâna viitoare.
translations.cs: Omlouvám se, nemohu se zúčastnit příštího semináře.
translations.da: Undskyld, jeg kan ikke deltage i næste uges seminar.
translations.fi: Olen pahoillani, en voi osallistua ensi viikon seminaariin.

tokens.explanation: Polite apology or attention-getter at the start of the sentence.
Time expression indicating when the seminar occurs.
Links '来週' and 'セミナー' to form 'next week's seminar'.
Refers to the event (seminar) in question.
Marks 'セミナー' as the target of attendance or non-attendance.
Noun that combines with 'できる' to express ability or inability to attend.
Polite negative potential form indicating inability to do '出席'.

sentences.target: 学生は全員出席していますね？
sentences.reading: がくせいはぜんいんしゅっせきしていますね？

translations.fr: Tous les élèves sont présents, non ?
translations.it: Tutti gli studenti sono presenti, giusto?
translations.yue: 所有學生都喺度，係唔係？
translations.pt: Todos os alunos estão presentes, certo?
translations.vi: Tất cả học sinh đều có mặt, phải không?
translations.hi: सभी छात्र मौजूद हैं, है ना?
translations.el: Όλοι οι μαθητές είναι παρόντες, σωστά;
translations.nb: Alle elever er til stede, ikke sant?
translations.sv: Alla elever är närvarande, eller hur?
translations.da: Alle elever er til stede, ikke?
translations.fi: Kaikki oppilaat ovat paikalla, eikö niin?

tokens.explanation: Refers to the students as the group being discussed.
Marks '学生' as the topic of the sentence.
Indicates that every person in the group is included.
Noun that combines with 'する' to mean 'to attend'.
Stem of 'する', attaching to form the progressive aspect.
Connects the verb stem to the auxiliary 'いる' to form the progressive.
Polite continuous auxiliary indicating an ongoing state (are attending).
Sentence-ending particle seeking confirmation or agreement.

sentences.target: 昨日の集まりに出席したよ！
sentences.reading: きのうのあつまりにしゅっせきしたよ！

translations.fr: J’ai assisté à la réunion d’hier !
translations.de: Ich habe gestern am Treffen teilgenommen!
translations.pt: Eu participei do encontro de ontem!
translations.vi: Tôi đã tham dự buổi họp mặt ngày hôm qua!
translations.nl: Ik was gisteren aanwezig bij de bijeenkomst!
translations.hi: मैंने कल की सभा में भाग लिया!
translations.ro: Am participat la adunarea de ieri!

tokens.explanation: Time expression indicating when the gathering took place.
Links '昨日' and '集まり' to form 'yesterday's gathering'.
Refers to the event or get-together being attended.
Marks '集まり' as the target of the action.
Noun that combines with 'する' to mean 'to attend'.
Past tense of 'する', indicating the action was completed.
Sentence-ending particle adding emphasis or assertion.
